name: Special Lagnas Overview
description: Additional ascendants calculated for specific life areas beyond birth lagna
purpose: Supplement main lagna analysis with specialized perspectives
usage: Check planets and lords in relation to these special lagnas for specific predictions
vedicReferences: Described in Jataka Parijata, Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra, and other classics
note: Each special lagna acts as an alternative ascendant for its specific area

name: Hora Lagna
description: Special ascendant for wealth and financial matters - most important for money analysis
calculationMethod: Based on sunrise and elapsed ghatis since sunrise

calculation.step1: Calculate ghatis (24 minutes) elapsed from sunrise to birth
calculation.step4: Add result to birth lagna longitude
calculation.step5: The sign falling at this longitude is Hora Lagna

usage: Primary lagna for wealth predictions and financial analysis

interpretation.planets: Planets in relation to Hora Lagna show wealth sources
interpretation.lord: Hora Lagna lord's position shows how wealth comes
interpretation.aspects: Benefic aspects to Hora Lagna indicate wealth gains

strengthFactors: Strong Hora Lagna lord indicates good wealth
Benefics in Hora Lagna give financial gains
2nd and 11th from Hora Lagna show income and gains
Dhana yogas from Hora Lagna enhance wealth

examples.strong: Jupiter in Hora Lagna with strong lord - excellent wealth through righteous means
examples.moderate: Venus aspecting Hora Lagna - good wealth through beauty/arts
examples.weak: Saturn afflicting Hora Lagna with weak lord - financial struggles

vedicReferences: Hora Lagna extensively used in Jataka Parijata for wealth

name: Ghati Lagna
description: Based on ghatis elapsed since sunrise - shows general life strength and direction

calculation.step1: Calculate ghatis elapsed from sunrise to birth
calculation.step4: The sign at this longitude is Ghati Lagna

usage: General life strength and major life event timing

interpretation.planets: Planets with Ghati Lagna show life themes
interpretation.lord: Ghati Lagna lord indicates life direction
interpretation.strength: Strong Ghati Lagna gives overall life strength
interpretation.weakness: Weak Ghati Lagna creates life challenges

strengthFactors: Strong Ghati Lagna lord gives good life direction
Benefics with Ghati Lagna support life
Kendras from Ghati Lagna should be strong
No malefic afflictions preferred

examples.strong: Sun in Ghati Lagna - strong life force, clear direction, vitality
examples.moderate: Moon aspecting Ghati Lagna - emotional life direction
examples.weak: Rahu-Ketu axis on Ghati Lagna - confusing life direction

vedicReferences: Ghati Lagna used in classical texts for life assessment

name: Bhava Lagna
description: Mid-point of first house - represents physical manifestation and tangible results
calculationMethod: Middle point of the first house
calculationFormula: Midpoint between 1st house cusp and 2nd house cusp

calculation.step1: Find longitude of lagna (1st house cusp)
calculation.step4: The sign at this midpoint is Bhava Lagna

usage: Physical body, tangible life results, material manifestation

interpretation.planets: Planets near Bhava Lagna affect physical body directly
interpretation.lord: Bhava Lagna lord shows how body manifests life
interpretation.health: Health issues seen from Bhava Lagna
interpretation.material: Material results seen from this lagna

strengthFactors: Strong Bhava Lagna lord gives good health
Benefics near Bhava Lagna protect body
6th and 8th from Bhava Lagna show health issues
Strong connection to birth lagna enhances effects

examples.strong: Mars in Bhava Lagna - strong physical body, energetic manifestation
examples.moderate: Jupiter aspecting Bhava Lagna - healthy body, wisdom manifests
examples.weak: Saturn afflicting Bhava Lagna - weak body, delayed manifestation

vedicReferences: Bhava Lagna for physical manifestation in classics

name: Vighati Lagna
description: More precise than Ghati Lagna - based on vighatis (smaller time units)
calculationMethod: Based on vighatis elapsed since sunrise

calculation.step1: Calculate vighatis elapsed from sunrise (1 ghati = 60 vighatis)
calculation.step4: The sign at this longitude is Vighati Lagna

usage: Precise event timing and detailed predictions
strengthFactors: Used for very precise predictions
Requires accurate birth time (within minutes)
Best for timing specific events
Complements Ghati Lagna analysis

name: Pranapada Lagna
description: Breath of life - shows vitality, longevity, and life force strength
calculationMethod: Complex calculation based on lagna, Moon, and special factors
calculationFormula: Based on distance between lagna and Moon, with special adjustments

calculation.step1: Calculate distance from lagna to Moon in navamsa
calculation.step2: Apply special rules based on odd/even sign

usage: Longevity, vitality, life force analysis, health predictions

interpretation.health: Health issues seen from this lagna
interpretation.prana: Connection to breath and vital energy

strengthFactors: Strong Pranapada lord gives longevity
Benefics with Pranapada protect life
Malefics afflicting reduce vitality
8th house from Pranapada shows life threats

examples.strong: Jupiter in Pranapada with strong lord - excellent longevity, strong vitality
examples.moderate: Venus aspecting Pranapada - good health, decent longevity
examples.weak: Saturn-Mars on Pranapada - health challenges, vitality issues

vedicReferences: Pranapada important for longevity in Jataka Parijata

name: Indu Lagna
description: Special wealth ascendant - shows accumulated wealth and prosperity potential
calculationMethod: Based on specific planetary positions and mathematical calculations
calculationFormula: Complex calculation involving lagna lord, 9th lord, and other factors

calculation.step1: Determine position of lagna lord and 9th lord
calculation.step2: Apply mathematical formula based on specific rules

usage: Wealth accumulation, prosperity analysis, financial success predictions

interpretation.wealth: Strong Indu Lagna indicates great wealth

strengthFactors: Strong Indu Lagna lord brings wealth
Jupiter/Venus with Indu excellent for prosperity
2nd and 11th from Indu show wealth gains
Dhana yogas from Indu multiply wealth

examples.strong: Jupiter-Venus in Indu with strong lord - exceptional wealth, great prosperity
examples.moderate: Mercury in Indu - good business wealth, trade success
examples.weak: Saturn afflicting Indu with weak lord - financial struggles

vedicReferences: Indu Lagna detailed in wealth chapters of classics

name: Sree Lagna
description: Goddess Lakshmi's blessing - shows overall prosperity, comfort, and fortune
calculationMethod: Based on Moon's longitude and specific calculations
calculationFormula: Calculated from Moon's position with special adjustments

calculation.step2: Add specific degrees based on calculation method

usage: Overall prosperity, comfort, fortune, and divine blessings assessment
strengthFactors: Strong Sree Lagna lord brings prosperity
Jupiter/Venus with Sree gives divine blessings
Benefics aspecting Sree enhance fortune
Connection to 9th and 11th houses multiplies prosperity

examples.strong: Venus-Jupiter in Sree Lagna - exceptional prosperity, divine grace, luxury life
examples.moderate: Moon in Sree - emotional prosperity, comfortable life
examples.weak: Rahu-Saturn afflicting Sree - prosperity challenges, comfort lacking

vedicReferences: Sree Lagna for Lakshmi's blessings in Jataka texts

name: Varnada Lagna
description: Shows external appearance, social status, and public reputation
calculationMethod: Based on hora lord and specific calculations
calculationFormula: Calculated from hora divisions and lagna

calculation.step2: Apply calculation based on odd/even hora

usage: Social status, public image, complexion, and reputation analysis
strengthFactors: Strong Varnada lord gives good status
Benefics with Varnada enhance reputation
10th from Varnada shows public status
Connection to lagna improves public image

examples.strong: Sun in Varnada with strong lord - high social status, good reputation
examples.moderate: Venus in Varnada - pleasant appearance, decent status
examples.weak: Saturn afflicting Varnada - poor reputation, dark complexion

vedicReferences: Varnada for status in classical texts

name: Dhooma Lagna
description: Smoke point - shows hidden obstacles and unclear situations
usage: Hidden obstacles, unclear situations, secret enemies analysis
strengthFactors: Malefics near Dhooma create strong obstacles
Benefics can reduce Dhooma's negative effects
Houses affected by Dhooma face confusion
Remedies needed for strong Dhooma afflictions

examples.afflicted: Mars on Dhooma - hidden anger issues, secret conflicts
examples.benefic: Jupiter aspecting Dhooma - wisdom dispels confusion

vedicReferences: Dhooma as upagraha in classical texts

name: Kala Lagna
description: Time-based ascendant showing temporal influences on life
calculationMethod: Based on birth time and specific calculations
usage: Time-based predictions, period analysis, temporal effects
strengthFactors: Strong Kala Lagna lord supports timing
Benefics with Kala enhance time effects
Used for period-specific predictions
Complements dasha timing analysis

name: Practical Application Guide
description: How to use special lagnas in chart analysis

methodology.action: Use software or manual calculation for each special lagna
Wealth query? Use Hora, Indu, Sree. Health? Use Pranapada, Bhava. Status? Use Varnada

methodology.focus: Check planets in relation to special lagna
methodology.action: Note planets conjunct, aspecting, or ruling the special lagna
Find lord of special lagna sign, check its strength and position
Relevant houses from special lagna (2nd, 11th for wealth lagnas, 8th for longevity, etc.)
Combine special lagna analysis with main birth chart analysis

bestPractices: Never use special lagnas alone - always combine with birth lagna
Hora and Indu most reliable for wealth
Sree Lagna for overall prosperity assessment
Multiple special lagnas showing same theme strengthen predictions
Require accurate birth time for precision
Use for specific questions, not general readings
commonMistakes: Relying only on special lagnas ignoring birth chart
Using too many special lagnas causing confusion
Not checking special lagna lord strength
Wrong calculations from inaccurate birth time

realExamples.wealthQuery: Check Hora, Indu, Sree Lagnas + their lords + 2nd/11th houses from each + Jupiter/Venus positions relative to these
realExamples.healthQuery: Check Pranapada, Bhava Lagnas + their lords + 6th/8th houses from each + malefic influences
realExamples.marriageQuery: Check regular 7th house primarily, Sree Lagna for marital prosperity, Venus position from special lagnas
realExamples.careerQuery: Check regular 10th house primarily, Varnada for status, Sun position from special lagnas

vedicReferences: Jataka Parijata, Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra chapters on special ascendants
